title: gomphandra luzoniensis
intro: Gomphandra luzoniensis, also known as the Philippine tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gelsemiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gomphandra luzoniensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
